metadata.title: Battery Indicator
metadata.description: Displays current battery level in the status bar.

regex.source: .setDesc("Show the battery percentage in addition to the icon.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在图标旁边显示电池百分比")

regex.source: .setDesc("Show separate icons for charging indicator and current battery level.")
regex.target: .setDesc("分别显示充电指示图标和当前电池电量图标")
